national trainer dr. Ahmed and just wondering dr. Ahmed while we wait for our taxi you tell me a little bit about what your philosophy is on training like I know I've seen so many of your amazing reviews and what are you doing that makes people basically enjoy what could be quite a stressful experience what are you doing differently I just have fun too I make it fun and that's the key people don't know what to expect out there today or any kind of course and it Samsung come a little bit of anxiety and if you can take that away by just chilling enjoying the day making the most of it I'm sure they look much more than they are when they're anxious yeah I totally agree he can it's like a barrier anxiety you cover me range is very nice and old building this is all the innovative

did you just do who had fun that was probably the most product I've ever used in a training day absolutely we did like eight five six or seven transformed five six different Hungarian ladies left looking a lot happier but yeah that was quite intense but it's great having two trainers and that was good and I tell you what I say well I learned from your style because it is at the moment where they do something a little bit good like that's it but I learn something from you as well and as their attention to detail that sometimes we can take for granted while we're working on a fire on ourselves but if you teach that to someone that could find detail the they feel they've gained a lot from that yeah
